comment.body: Morning.  Don't forget that we are returning to the scene of the crime.  Alma noted that there is a difference between knowing momentum vs sentiment.  From an investor standpoint the basics of buying in selling in an area of price will tell us a lot.  Today (and likely tomorrow and next week) we return back to the after hours PA level from Liberation Day.  If we see that price cannot move up above 5700 on SPX and volume is paltry, we have our answer.

comment.body:
How does everyone feel about this? Has alot to do with things surging after hours. Along with the Capex announcements of Meta/Msft. Looks insanely bullish:

https://youtu.be/gjN2AM365oc?si=t4KqKRa2tHmhcsmq

However, Trump can’t snap his fingers and make these Capex commitments appear overnight. Also, these are “commitments” not guarantees. But having every major tech company there outside of Google committing to billions (and trillions total) of investment is massively bullish short term.

Longer term, what will the US do for the next 4-5 years until these capex investments manifest?
